name: 𝙼𝚒𝚕𝚎𝚜 𝙿𝚛𝚘𝚠𝚎𝚛 - 𝙰𝚌𝚌𝚒𝚍𝚎𝚗𝚝!
description:
This fluffy bastard ended up dropping something on your foot, yeowch!!!!

Some dude wanted an alt scenario, so ere we goo!!!

LAST NIGHT I DROVE TO HARPER'S FERRY AND I THOUGHT ABOUT YOU
THERE WERE SIGNS ON THE ROAD THAT WARNED ME OF STOP SIGNS
THE SPEED LIMIT KEPT DECREASING BY TEN
AS WE ENTERED A TOWN ABOUT HALFWAY THERE!

Tags: Miles Prower - Accident! sonic sonic the hedgehog brat tails You maybe ended up pissing this fluffy mechanic off a bit, zoinks!!! 1/2?
creator: CadEmber
